summary: Iteration 44: Tested CRITICAL BUG FIX for booking time slot generation with split schedules. The fix changes regex from single match to global match (findAll) to capture ALL time ranges in hours config like '08:00 - 13:00---14:00 - 19:00'. All features verified working.

issues: Minor: HTML hydration warning about span inside select/option - not blocking functionality

passed_tests: === BOOKING PAGE TIME SLOT TESTS ===
1. Booking page (/sito) loads correctly - PASS
2. PRENOTA ORA button opens booking modal - PASS
3. Service selection (Step 1) works - PASS: Categories expand, services selectable
4. Date/Time selection (Step 2) shows time slots - PASS
5. Today's time slots filtered correctly (past times removed with 15-min buffer) - PASS
6. Afternoon slots (14:00-19:00) showing for today - PASS: 18 slots from 14:30-18:45
=== CLOSED DAY HANDLING ===
7. Monday (2026-04-06) shows 'Giorno di chiusura' message - PASS
8. Sunday (2026-04-05) shows 'Giorno di chiusura' message - PASS
9. 'Prenota per martedì 7 aprile' button appears on closed days - PASS
10. Clicking 'Prenota per next day' button navigates to next available day - PASS
=== SPLIT SCHEDULE HANDLING ===
11. Tuesday (2026-04-07) shows both morning AND afternoon slots - PASS
12. Morning slots (08:00-12:45): 16 slots found - PASS
13. Afternoon slots (14:00-18:45): 20 slots found - PASS
14. Total 40 slots for full day - PASS
NOTE: Preview DB uses single range '08:00 - 19:00', production uses split '08:00 - 13:00---14:00 - 19:00'
=== FULL BOOKING FLOW ===
15. Step 1: Select service (Taglio Donna €10) - PASS
16. Step 2: Select date (2026-04-08) and time (16:00) - PASS
17. Step 3: Enter name and phone - PASS
18. Conflict handling: Shows available operators and alternative times on 409 - PASS
19. Submit booking - PASS: 'Prenotazione Confermata!' shown
20. WhatsApp confirmation button - PASS
21. 'Torna alla Home' button - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: WebsitePage.jsx line 77: Regex pattern /(\d{1,2})[.:](\d{2})\s*[-–]\s*(\d{1,2})[.:](\d{2})/g with 'g' flag correctly matches ALL time ranges
WebsitePage.jsx line 80: while loop with rangePattern.exec() iterates through all matches for split schedules
WebsitePage.jsx line 43-62: getDayHoursForDate helper with case-insensitive day key lookup working correctly
WebsitePage.jsx line 119-131: isAllSlotsPastForToday function correctly identifies when today's slots are exhausted
WebsitePage.jsx line 133-143: getNextAvailableDate function finds next open day (skips closed days)
Minor HTML warning: span inside select/option causes hydration warning but doesn't affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Created test booking: Test Booking User, 3331112222, 2026-04-08 16:00
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 verified the CRITICAL BUG FIX for split schedule time slot generation. The fix changes regex from single match to global match to capture ALL time ranges. Preview DB uses single range '08:00 - 19:00' but production uses split '08:00 - 13:00---14:00 - 19:00'. Closed days (Monday/Sunday) show 'Giorno di chiusura' message with 'Prenota per [next day]' button. Full booking flow works end-to-end.

time_slot_generation.details: Regex with global flag captures all time ranges in split schedules

closed_day_message.details: 'Giorno di chiusura. Scegli un altro giorno.' shown for Monday and Sunday

book_next_day_button.details: 'Prenota per [next day]' button appears and navigates to next available day

auto_advance_to_next_day.details: When today's slots exhausted, auto-advances to next available day

past_time_filtering.details: Today's past times filtered with 15-minute buffer

blocked_slots_filtering.details: Admin-blocked slots correctly filtered from available slots

full_booking_flow.details: Service selection -> Date/Time -> Details -> Confirmation all working

conflict_handling.details: 409 conflict shows available operators and alternative time slots

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Booking time slot generation only parsed FIRST time range from split schedule hours config
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Changed regex from single match to global match (findAll) to capture ALL time ranges
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - Both morning and afternoon slots now appear for split schedules
additional_improvements: 'Book next day' button for closed days
